MercadoLibre: Q2 Earnings Snapshot MONTEVIDEO, Uruguay (AP) — MercadoLibre SA (MELI) on Monday reported second-quarter net income of $523 million. On a per-share basis, the Montevideo, Uruguay-based company said it had net income of $10.31. The results fell short of Wall Street expectations.

MercadoLibre slips 5% premarket as Brazil free-shipping changes weigh on margins Investing.com - Shares of MercadoLibre (NASDAQ:MELI) dropped 5% in premarket trading after the Latin American e-commerce company posted second-quarter earnings that fell well short of Wall Street expectations, as a decision to expand free shipping in its key Brazil market weighed on profit margins.
